meta.name: Auto Detail Pros
meta.description: An energetic, promotional e-commerce store selling automotive detailing products. The design uses bold typography, high-impact imagery, and vibrant red accents to create a sense of urgency and excitement, targeting car enthusiasts and DIY detailers.

fonts.sans: system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif
fonts.mono: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, monospace
fonts.serif: Georgia, Cambria, 'Times New Roman', Times, serif

header.notes: The header in the screenshot is actually positioned strangely in the middle of the page below the UGC section, but acts as a main navigation bar. It features a dark background, logo on left, a wide prominent search bar in center, and icon buttons for login/cart on right. Below this is a secondary navigation row with text links and dropdown indicators.

footer.notes: Standard dark footer with 4 columns of text links, social media icons in the bottom right, a scroll-to-top button centered above the copyright, and a prominent legal disclaimer.

productCard.notes: Clean white background cards. Bold uppercase titles. Prices shown with prominent green savings badges for discounted items. A distinctive red outlined 'badge' shows reward points or entries. Minimal border, relies on spacing.

productGrid.notes: Products are displayed in a horizontal carousel layout with navigation arrows below the grid, followed by a prominent red 'Shop All' button centered beneath the carousel.

featuredProducts.label: NEW PRODUCTS
featuredProducts.heading: BEST SELLERS
featuredProducts.notes: Sections use centered, bold, uppercase display typography for headings. Carousels have a thin gray progress bar and round arrow buttons for navigation.

sections.name: announcement-bar

content.headline: Promotional sale announcement
content.specialElements: Sitewide promotional text with discount details.

sections.notes: Sticks to very top of page.

sections.name: hero
sections.layout: Full width banner, text content on left, large product/lifestyle image on right.

design.background: Dark background with a gradient or subtle pattern. Appears to be a full-bleed image with a dark vignette/overlay on the left side.
design.text: White text. Extremely large, bold, uppercase sans-serif headline. Smaller standard sans-serif for subheadline.
design.styling: No borders. Centered vertically. Large promotional feel.

content.headline: Major sitewide promotional headline
content.body: Subheadline explaining value proposition and secondary promotional offer.
content.cta: Single prominent solid red button with white uppercase text, slightly rounded corners (~2px).

media.description: High-energy lifestyle shot featuring a luxury sports car, a person celebrating, and a large assortment of car care products, with money flying around.

content.specialElements: 5 gold star rating and text indicating trust from millions of customers below the CTA button.

sections.notes: Highly energetic and promotional hero section.

sections.name: promotional-banners

design.background: White page background, banners have diverse, colorful image backgrounds.
design.text: Varied typography depending on banner graphic, mostly bold and energetic.
design.styling: Equal width banners, square-ish aspect ratio. Slight gaps between images.

content.headline: Seasonal promotion heading above the grid.
content.cta: Each banner has a white or black solid button with contrasting text, uppercase, slightly rounded corners.

media.description: Three distinct promotional graphics. One for a specific product bundle, one for a mystery kit, one for seasonal polishing products.

sections.notes: Acts as secondary navigation to key promotional categories.

sections.name: category-circles
sections.layout: Horizontal row of circular images with text labels below.

design.styling: Images are perfectly circular. Clean spacing.

media.description: Action shots of car detailing tasks specific to each category (e.g., washing an exterior, cleaning interior, polishing).

sections.name: brand-features-banner
sections.layout: Full-width background image with text overlay. Text is split: bold statement on left, three icon/feature columns on right.

design.background: Dark, slightly transparent overlay over a background image of products.
design.text: White text. Large bold uppercase statement on left. Smaller text with red accents on right.
design.styling: Padding top and bottom. Dark contrast band.

content.headline: Bold statement of brand authority and quality.
content.body: Brief supporting text explaining the brand ethos.
content.cta: Solid red button with white text.

media.description: Background shows rows of neatly organized product bottles on a shelf.

content.specialElements: Three column feature list with red icons highlighting value propositions (results, ease of use, convenience).

sections.notes: Builds trust and explains why to choose the brand.

sections.name: new-products-carousel
sections.layout: Centered heading followed by a horizontal row of product cards. Navigation arrows below.

design.text: Dark text for products, red for CTA.

content.headline: Heading indicating newly arrived items.
content.cta: Solid red 'Shop All' button centered below carousel.

media.description: Clear product shots on white backgrounds.

content.specialElements: Prominent promotional badges (red outline) indicating reward entries on each product.

sections.notes: Standard product carousel with a 'view all' CTA at the bottom.

sections.name: best-sellers-carousel
sections.layout: Centered heading followed by a horizontal row of product cards. Navigation arrows below.

design.text: Dark text for products, red for CTA.

content.headline: Heading indicating top selling items.
content.cta: Solid red 'Shop All' button centered below carousel.

media.description: Clear product shots on white backgrounds, often showing kits/bundles.

sections.notes: Similar structure to the new products carousel.

sections.name: ugc-video-grid
sections.layout: Centered heading followed by a row of 5 tall, vertical video thumbnails.

design.styling: Vertical video format (like TikTok/Reels). Slight gap between videos.

content.headline: Heading indicating products in use.

media.description: Vertical user-generated style videos showing products being applied to cars.

content.specialElements: Below each video thumbnail is a small product card showing the item featured in the video, with a tiny chevron pointing up.

sections.name: brand-story-split
sections.layout: 50/50 split. Image grid/collage on left, text and CTA on right. Note: The layout here is messy in the screenshot due to the navigation bar being placed over it.

design.background: Light gray on the text side.

content.headline: Brand 'Who We Are' statement.
content.body: Paragraph describing brand origins or philosophy.

media.description: Collage of lifestyle photos, a retail store, people working, branded items.

sections.name: newsletter-signup
sections.layout: Full width background image with a dark overlay box containing the signup form on the left side.

design.background: Full width image of a warehouse/store with an employee.
design.text: White text inside the dark overlay box.
design.styling: Dark, slightly transparent box for the form. Inputs are white.

content.headline: Newsletter signup call to action offering a discount.
content.body: Supporting text mentioning promotional entries or benefits.
content.cta: Solid red button, full width of the form field.

media.description: Person carrying a box in a product warehouse.

content.specialElements: Input field for email address above the submit button.

sections.notes: High contrast signup area to capture leads.
